headline: A Look At Wabtec (WAB) Valuation As Earnings Expectations And Sector Outperformance Draw Investor Interest
summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) heads into Wednesday’s pre market earnings release with expectations for 13.4% year on year revenue growth, after previously beating revenue forecasts but missing organic revenue estimates. See our latest analysis for Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies. At a share price of US$257.63, Wabtec has had a 1 month share price return of 9.14% and a year to date share price return of 19.12%.
